MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-03-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF TIBOR SZABO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/7/07 IS CONTINUED TO 6/4/07 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET WITH NOTICE MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
